_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collaborate with development organizations to create and deploy the tools needed to achieve objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.557), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.524).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.651). Shared vocabulary: [objectives]. DCWF-only terms [achieve, collaborate, create, deploy, development, needed] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.892, R=0.877). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Collaborate with development organizations to create and deploy the tools needed" and "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.570 < STS 0.651 (gap -0.081). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [achieve, collaborate, create] and [accountability, across, boundaries] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [objectives]. DCWF-only: [achieve, collaborate, create, deploy, development, needed]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing].
